## Summary

Describe the change in one or two short paragraphs.

## Change Type

- [ ] Protocol semantics
- [ ] Reference CLI behavior
- [ ] Schema or example fixture
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Runtime adapter guidance
- [ ] Community or repository maintenance

## VALP Checklist

- [ ] Keeps Full Mode, Remote Mode, and Manual Mode clearly separated
- [ ] Does not weaken receipt semantics
- [ ] Does not weaken review or approval gates
- [ ] Avoids hard-coding one machine, terminal, project, provider, or runtime
- [ ] Updates schemas/examples when machine-readable fields change
- [ ] Avoids unsupported production or platform-support claims

## Verification

Paste the relevant command output, or explain why it is not applicable.

```bash
scripts/verify-examples.sh
```

## Evidence

Link the docs, examples, task folder, schema path, or issue/discussion that
supports this change.
